beats.label: Homepage overview
beats.caption: Pelian homepage showing services and portfolio
beats.narrationText: Pelian builds custom AI solutions that transform businesses. Today, let's look at one of our recent projects.

beats.label: Scroll to Our Work
beats.caption: Portfolio section with project cards
beats.narrationText: In our portfolio, you'll see real-world applications of our AI engineering expertise.

beats.label: Hover FlexPay
beats.caption: FlexPay project card highlighted
beats.narrationText: Here's FlexPay - a phone financing platform we built for the fintech sector.

beats.label: Click FlexPay
beats.caption: Clicking the FlexPay project card
beats.narrationText: Let's dive into the details of this project.

beats.label: FlexPay project page
beats.caption: FlexPay project details page loads
beats.narrationText: This is the FlexPay case study. We developed an AI-powered platform that streamlines phone financing approvals and risk assessment.

beats.label: Scroll details
beats.caption: Scrolling through project achievements
beats.narrationText: The platform reduced approval times by 85% and increased conversion rates through intelligent automation.

beats.label: Summary
beats.caption: FlexPay project highlights
beats.narrationText: FlexPay demonstrates how Pelian delivers measurable results through custom AI solutions - transforming complex processes into seamless experiences.
